nasb.text: “Two men went up into the temple to pray, one a Pharisee and the other a tax collector.

esv.text: “Two men went up into the temple to pray, one a Pharisee and the other a tax collector.

cnv.text: “有兩個人上聖殿去祈禱，一個是法利賽人，一個是稅吏。

ccb.text: “有两个人到圣殿里祷告，一个是法利赛人，一个是税吏。

csbs.text: “有两个人上圣殿去祷告。一个是法利赛人，另一个是税吏。
